Root Cause Drill-down

Correlated timeline and hypotheses.

INC-2026-031 · Login failures & latency spike

P1 CriticalImpacted users: 8,200ACKed by IAM on-call
Opened 22:01 · Env: prod · Domain: IAM/Auth

Hypotheses

H1 (0.92): Keycloak cache saturation from Redis pressure.

H2 (0.61): DB connection bottleneck on primary.

H3 (0.34): External IdP latency.

Unified Timeline

TimeEventTag
21:58Keycloak realm config changedchange-event
22:00Latency p95 crossed 2.0smetric-alert
22:01Redis memory hit 92%dependency
22:03Incident auto-correlatedsystem
22:05On-call ACK and mitigationhuman-action
